name: Fruit-Nut Nibbles
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cereal, peanuts and banana chips in a 3-quart casserole or bowl. Mix margarine, honey, cinnamon and salt; pour over cereal mixture, tossing until evenly coated.
2. Microwave uncovered on high for 3 to 4 minutes, stirring after 2 minutes, until toasted. Watch carefully so the mixture does not burn.
3. Stir in popcorn, coconut and raisins. Sprinkle with additional salt if desired. Let stand about 1 hour or until cool. Store in tightly covered container up to 1 week. ABOUT 12 CUPS SNACK; 130 CALORIES PER 1/2 CUP.
